calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing Of Motion To Quash And/Or Modify Subpoena
Off Calendar Jan-29-2019 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
Appearances:
Jeffrey H. Haas, In Propria Persona (415-731-4680) appears as self-represented petitioner/moving party

No other appearance is made in this matter

Stipulation and order appointing judge pro tem is signed, filed.

The Court notes that no party indicated it was contesting the motion, but the moving party indicates he notified the opposing side that he would appear. Court hears from the moving party and reviews forms, notices and subpoenas submitted in oen court. Court also notes that the opposing side has agreed to withdraw a subpoena in favor of a more limited version.

PETITIONER JEFFREY HAAS' Motion To Quash And/Or Modify Subpoena is GRANTED. Request for sanctions is under submission. Court will prepare a written order.

Judge Pro Tem: Roger B. Mead: Clerk: J. Rios Merida; Reporter: not reported (Disc302)
